candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; acceptable fallback if Revenue missing.
This is COGS, not revenue.
Cost line, not revenue.

variables.notes: Use Revenue as primary top-line; Total Revenue is a duplicate fallback across possible label changes.

candidates.why: Direct production cost line and equals Cost of revenues/COGS numerically.
Only a component of production costs, not full COGS.
Component of production costs, not full COGS.
Explicit COGS label; best semantic match for direct cost of sales.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not period COGS expense.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit COGS row rather than components or inventory-related balance sheet items.

candidates.why: Valid SG&A overhead component.
Subcomponent of administrative expenses; prefer broader component row when available.
Valid overhead bucket, though smaller and less central than distribution/administrative.
Can be SG&A-related overhead, but standalone supplemental line may not represent total SG&A.
Excluded for XSGA because depreciation should not be selected.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Administrative expenses
candidates.why: Excluded for XSGA because amortization should not be selected.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Right-of-Use Assets in Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Excluded for XSGA because depreciation should not be selected.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization, excluded from XSGA.

variables.notes: Candidate list clearly misses the major SG&A/selling overhead row 'Distribution costs', which appears to be the primary selling/distribution expense and should be included. Included 'Administrative expenses' and 'Other operating expenses' as overhead buckets. Included 'Research and development costs' as well because it is separately reported and the PROF formula subtracts XRD from XSGA_COMPONENTS; this preserves coverage of operating overhead before subtracting R&D. Manual review needed due to use of out-of-candidate row 'Distribution costs'. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Distribution costs, [Income Statement] Research and development costs

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line; best match.
Only a component of R&D.
Subcomponent of R&D, not full R&D expense.
Subcomponent of R&D, not full R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Minor subcomponent of R&D.
Not an income statement R&D expense line and appears empty.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D expense line exists and is selected.

candidates.why: Broader finance-cost bucket, useful only as fallback if no direct interest line available.
Direct interest expense label for debt, but may not cover all years or all interest types.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Direct interest expense label, appears in latest year and likely the best current-period label.
Generic direct interest expense label; strong fit and available in several years.
Specific lease-interest component only, not total interest expense.
Too broad and not specifically interest expense.
Direct interest label but appears empty in preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Lease-interest component only and supplemental.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross

variables.notes: Priority list of direct interest labels first, with broader Financial Expenses only as last-resort fallback for years where direct interest line is unavailable.

candidates.why: Not shareholders' equity on the balance sheet.
Asset/investment line, not book equity.
Direct balance-sheet equity line; preferred over total equity incl. minority interest.
Could overstate BE if minority interest exists; use only if no pure equity line exists.
Balancing row, not preferred.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Not equity; total balance sheet balancing item.
Total liabilities and equity, not book equity.

variables.notes: Selected the direct equity line, which avoids potential double counting from 'Total Equity & Minority Interest'.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not preferred balance-sheet minority interest.
Income statement allocation line, not preferred balance-sheet minority interest.
Combined equity total, not a standalone minority-interest line; using it would double count with BE.

variables.notes: No standalone balance-sheet minority interest/non-controlling interest line is present. Since BE uses 'Equity', MIB is set to [] to avoid double counting.
